dct_description_sm: par le S. Robert de Vaugondy ; gravé par E. Dussy ; Groux sculp.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
2 bar scales on map given in "Milles hebraiques" and "Milles romains".
Shows topography, drainage, territories of the twelve tribes of Israel, places of historical interest.
Features a decorative title cartouche with illustrations of biblical references, including the ten commandments / Groux sculp.
Appears in Robert de Vaugondy's Nouvel atlas portatif. Paris, Charles Francois Delamarche, 1790.
